# bbang.dev

> Personal tech blog by Sangho Han (GitHub: bbbang105). Notes on backend, infrastructure, AI/LLM serving, security response, and engineering retrospectives. 140+ posts over two years, written primarily in Korean.

Static Astro site. Content is Markdown organized by category at /posts/<category>/<slug>/. UI supports a ko/en toggle; post bodies are Korean.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://bbang.dev/): full post index with client-side search
- [Collections](https://bbang.dev/collections/): posts grouped by category
- [About](https://bbang.dev/about/): author profile and portfolio

## Feeds

- [Sitemap](https://bbang.dev/sitemap.xml): every URL on the site
- [RSS](https://bbang.dev/rss.xml): full chronological post feed

## Notes

- Canonical host is https://bbang.dev (www.bbang.dev 307-redirects here).
- Primary post language: Korean.
